title: HG Jewellery Cleaning Bath, Jewellery Cleaner for Gold, Silver & Fine Jewellery, Cleaning Kit & Dip for Rings, Necklaces, Earrings & Brooches, Restores Shine & Sparkle - 300ml
features: HG Jewelry Cleaner: A premium jewellery bath cleaning set for silver, gold and other metals. Removes dirt quickly and efficiently, leaving jewellery looking shiny and clean
Professional finish at home: The gold, platinum or silver dip rapidly restores the look of dull bracelets, rings, necklaces or earrings, so they regain their original sparkle
Gentle on an array of metals: The fine jewellery cleaner is safe for use on precious metals, diamonds and gemstones, as well as dress jewellery, costume jewellery or most fashion jewellery
Easy to use silver cleaner kit: With liquid dip and tweezers. Immerse the jewellery in the bath for 3-5 minutes. Intricate detail can be cleaned with the included brush before rinsing
1 x HG Jewellery Cleaner Bath, 300ml. Discover the full range of HG cleaning products, including metal cleaner, clothing stain remover, multi surface cleaners and all purpose cleaner sprays
description: Product Description The HG Jewellery Cleaning Bath is a convenient way to remove dirt, grease and marks quickly and efficiently from your fine jewellery, leaving it looking shiny and clean again. Suitable for cleaning precious jewellery, the liquid gold, silver and platinum jewellery dip is also suitable for dress and costume jewellery and gems. After the treatment, dull bracelets, necklaces, brooches or earrings shine again! With the easy-to-use ring cleaner, gold jewellery cleaner, silver jewellery cleaner and sterling silver polish dip set, dirt and tarnish marks can be removed easily and efficiently. Includes: 1 x HG Jewellery Cleaning Bath (300ml), tweezers, brush. How to use: 1. Immerse the jewellery in the bath for 3 to 5 minutes. 2. Remove the jewellery from the liquid with the supplied tweezers. Inaccessible places can be given extra treatment with the supplied brush. 3. After treatment, rinse the jewellery and dry with a lint-free cloth. Avoid contact with skin. Keep this HG cleaner out of children's reach. Always read the label. Discover the HG professional range of specialist household cleaning products and cleaning sprays, including HG Mould Remover, HG Limescale Remover, grout cleaner, multi-purpose cleaners and all surface cleaner sprays for your home, office or outside space. Ingredients Anionic Surfactants, Non-Ionic Surfactants <5%, Preservation Agents: 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1,3-Diol; Methylisothiazolinone; Benzisothiazolinone, Perfumes Box Contains 1 x HG Jewellery Cleaning Bath Manufacturer Contact Information Made by: HG International B.V., P.J. Oudweg 41, 1314 CJ Almere, The Netherlands. See more
